name: The Tree House MC
about: The Tree House MC is a golf simulator venue in Miles City, Montana, featuring two top-of-the-line Trackman simulators. It offers a fun and friendly atmosphere for playing various courses, practicing on a virtual range, or enjoying games with friends and family. The venue operates by appointment daily from 8:00am-8:00pm, with walk-in hours available Thursday-Saturday from 2:00-6:00pm. It is locally owned and operated, providing a casual environment for golf enthusiasts of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end Trackman simulators for accurate ball tracking
Right and left-handed golf clubs available for use
BYOB policy allowing customers to bring their own alcoholic beverages
Variety of courses and games for entertainment
Flexible booking options with 1/2 and 1-hour tee times

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks and non-alcoholic beverages are offered.
Alcoholic beverages are not sold but customers are welcome to bring their own.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, right and left-handed golf clubs are available for use at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Alcoholic beverages are not sold but customers are welcome to bring their own. The venue offers snacks and non-alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 1-hour tee times are available Monday-Saturday 8am-8pm and Sunday 8am-6pm. 1/2 hour tee times are available upon request.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers games and activities suitable for kids, making it a family-friendly environment.
